title: github jcob-bd/notebooklm-mcp-cliを調べて、kernel/FUGUEに活用できるか検証せよ。/kernelで。
summary_text: 最小構成は、既存パターンをそのままNotebookLMに寄せるのが安全です。 1. `workflow_dispatch` で `issue_number` と live mode を受ける `notebooklm_live_smoke_mode` (`off|required`), `notebooklm_execute_live_mode` (`off|required`)。 参照: [googleworkspace-readonly-smoke.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/googleworkspace-readonly-smoke.yml), [freee-readonly-smoke.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/freee-readonly-smoke.yml) 2. `resolve-context` ジョブで hint を確定 `scripts/harness/resolve-orchestration-context.sh` を使い、`content_hint_applied/content_action_hint/content_skill_hint/content_reason` を出力。 参照: [googleworkspace-readonly-smoke.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/googleworkspace-readonly-smoke.yml#L21), [tests/test-fugue-bridge-handoff.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-fugue-bridge-handoff.sh#L144) 3. `notebooklm-preflight` ジョブを hint 条件で実行 `notebooklm-preflight-enrich.sh` を実行し、`skipped|planned|verified|blocked` を `GITHUB_OUTPUT` へ出す。 参照: [fugue-codex-implement.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml#L886), [notebooklm-preflight-enrich.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/notebooklm-preflight-enrich.sh#L143) 4. `runtime-readiness-gate` ジョブで fail-closed `check-notebooklm-runtime-readiness.sh` を実行し、production は通常 `NOTEBOOKLM_READINESS_LIVE_SMOKE_MODE=required` `NOTEBOOKLM_READINESS_EXECUTE_LIVE_MODE=required` で運用。 参照: [check-notebooklm-runtime-readiness.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-notebooklm-runtime-readiness.sh#L93) 5. artifact upload + finalize コメント `report.md` と `run/notebooklm/receipt.json` を保存し、Issueへ `status/summary` を投稿。 参照: [googleworkspace-readonly-smoke.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/googleworkspace-readonly-smoke.yml#L91), [freee-readonly-smoke.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/freee-readonly-smoke.yml#L87) 主要失敗モード（最小で抑えるべき点）は以下です。 - `EXECUTE_LIVE_MODE=required` なのに `LIVE_SMOKE_MODE=off` は即失敗。参照: [check-notebooklm-runtime-readiness.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-notebooklm-runtime-readiness.sh#L106) - Runtime必須なのに `nlm`/auth 不可なら `blocked` で終了。参照: [notebooklm-preflight-enrich.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/notebooklm-preflight-enrich.sh#L279) - 必須 skill 未導入で失敗。参照: [check-notebooklm-runtime-readiness.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-notebooklm-runtime-readiness.sh#L39) - live executeで bounded receipt (`receipt.json`) 不在なら失敗。参照: [check-notebooklm-runtime-readiness.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-notebooklm-runtime-readiness.sh#L87) Kernel運用上の注記: この検証はCodex単独laneで実施しており、並列lane要件（2+）の観点では補完が必要です。
